name: code-journal
description: Collect your AI coding-agent sessions and turn them into work reports.
author: pandazki

scripts.build: npm run build -w @code-journal/core && npm run build -w @code-journal/cli && npm run sync-plugin-bin
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @code-journal/core && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/*/dist packages/*/*.tsbuildinfo server/dist server/test-dist claude-plugin/bin/code-journal.js claude-plugin/bin/code-journal.js.map
scripts.postinstall: npm run build || echo 'postinstall: build skipped (run `npm run build` after deps settle)'
